import React from 'react'; import './Page.css'; import './AboutUs.css'; const EBOARD = [ { name: 'Anika', role: 'co-founder & president' }, { name: 'Maanya', role: 'co-founder & vice president' }, { name: 'name', role: 'treasurer' }, { name: 'name', role: 'secretary' }, ]; const PILLARS = [ { title: 'shakti', body: 'Shakti — the divine feminine force — is also inner strength. Every gathering we hold is an invitation to reconnect with that power within yourself.' }, { title: 'compassion', body: 'Rooted in Hindu thought, we lead with empathy, service, and care — for one another and for the communities we are part of.' }, { title: 'community', body: 'RU Shakti is a tight-knit circle of women at Rutgers. We grow through satsang-style reflection, open dialogue, and shared human values.' }, ]; export default function AboutUs() { return (

about us

RU Shakti is a student-led organization at Rutgers University–New Brunswick dedicated to women's empowerment, leadership development, and community-building through Hindu spirituality and shared human values.

{PILLARS.map(({ title, body }) => (

{title}

{body}

))}

executive board

{EBOARD.map(({ name, role }) => (

{name}

{role}

))}

our story

born from practice,
built for community

Founded in 2019, Ru Shakti began as a small weekly gathering of dancers, yogis, and martial artists who wanted something deeper than a studio class. What started in a borrowed basement is now a thriving collective offering movement workshops, retreats, and mentorship programs.

The name draws from Sanskrit — ru, to move, and shakti, the primordial feminine energy that drives all creation. Together they speak to a practice that is always in motion, always alive.

); }
